title: OSPF Operation and LSA Propagation
description: A visual representation of the OSPF (Open Shortest Path First) routing protocol process, showing neighbor discovery, link-state advertisement (LSA) propagation, and the building of the routing table.
relationships: Routers form adjacencies and elect DR/BDR
Routers exchange LSAs via LSU packets
Each router builds an identical Link-State Database
SPF algorithm calculates the shortest path tree
Routing table is populated from the SPF tree
